---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem It Solves
Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this feature to work? Provide examples and use cases.

## Use Cases
- Use case 1: ...
- Use case 2: ...
- Use case 3: ...

## Example Usage
Show how you would use this feature:

```bash
# Example command or code
python src/tool.py --new-flag argument
```

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered alternative solutions? List them here.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Priority
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Helpful
- [ ] High - Important

## Related Issues
Link any related issues using #123
